name: BotImpersonationPolicy
description: Policy for bots that are allowed to impersonate users. By default the scope is unrestricted - the bot can impersonate any user, including admins. To restrict admin impersonation, attach BotNonAdminImpersonationPolicy (or BotNonAdminImpersonationRole) instead, or add your own deny rules.

rules.name: BotImpersonationPolicy-Allow
rules.description: Allow the bot to impersonate users.
